452: 	}
453: 
454: 	// Handle chat-about-plan question input
455: 	if m.state == stateChatAboutTask {
456: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
457: 			m.state = stateDefault
458: 			return m, nil
459: 		}
460: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
461: 		if result.Dismissed {
462: 			if result.Submitted {
463: 				question := result.Value
464: 				planFile := m.pendingChatAboutTask
465: 				m.pendingChatAboutTask = ""
466: 				m.state = stateDefault
467: 				m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
468: 				if planFile != "" && question != "" {
469: 					return m.spawnChatAboutTask(planFile, question)
470: 				}
471: 				return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
472: 			}
473: 			m.pendingChatAboutTask = ""
474: 			m.state = stateDefault
475: 			m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
476: 			return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
477: 		}
478: 		return m, nil
479: 	}
480: 
481: 	// Handle focus mode — forward keys directly to the agent's PTY
482: 	if m.state == stateFocusAgent {
483: 		// Ctrl+Space exits focus mode
484: 		if msg.String() == "ctrl+space" {
485: 			m.exitFocusMode()
486: 			return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
487: 		}
488: 
489: 		// Ctrl+Up/Down: cycle through active instances (wrapping) while staying in focus mode
490: 		if msg.Code == tea.KeyUp && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) || msg.Code == tea.KeyDown && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) {
491: 			if msg.Code == tea.KeyUp && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) {
492: 				m.nav.CyclePrevActive()
493: 			} else {
494: 				m.nav.CycleNextActive()
495: 			}
496: 			cmd := m.instanceChanged()
497: 			// Re-enter focus mode for the newly selected instance
498: 			focusCmd := m.enterFocusMode()
499: 			return m, tea.Batch(cmd, focusCmd)
500: 		}
501: 
502: 		// Preview tab focus: forward to embedded terminal
503: 		if m.previewTerminal == nil {
504: 			m.exitFocusMode()
505: 			return m, nil
506: 		}
507: 		data := keyToBytes(msg)
508: 		if data == nil {
509: 			return m, nil
510: 		}
511: 		if err := m.previewTerminal.SendKey(data); err != nil {
512: 			return m, m.handleError(err)
513: 		}
514: 		return m, nil
515: 	}
516: 
517: 	// Handle send prompt state
518: 	if m.state == stateSendPrompt {
519: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
520: 			m.state = stateDefault
521: 			return m, nil
522: 		}
523: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
524: 		if result.Dismissed {
525: 			if result.Submitted {
526: 				value := result.Value
527: 				selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
528: 				if selected != nil && value != "" {
529: 					if err := selected.SendPrompt(value); err != nil {
530: 						m.state = stateDefault
531: 						m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
532: 						return m, m.handleError(err)
533: 					}
534: 					selected.SetStatus(session.Running)
535: 					// Emit audit event for prompt sent (truncate to 200 chars).
536: 					auditMsg := value
537: 					if len(auditMsg) > 200 {
538: 						auditMsg = auditMsg[:200]
539: 					}
540: 					m.audit(auditlog.EventPromptSent, auditMsg,
541: 						auditlog.WithInstance(selected.Title),
542: 					)
543: 				}
544: 			}
545: 			m.state = stateDefault
546: 			m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
547: 			return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
548: 		}
549: 		return m, nil
550: 	}
551: 
552: 	// Handle confirmation state
553: 	if m.state == stateConfirm {
554: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
555: 			m.state = stateDefault
556: 			return m, nil
557: 		}
558: 		// Pre-intercept 'a' (abort) before delegating to the overlay.
559: 		if msg.String() == "a" && m.pendingWaveAbortAction != nil {
560: 			abortAction := m.pendingWaveAbortAction
561: 			m.overlays.Dismiss()
562: 			m.state = stateDefault
563: 			m.pendingConfirmAction = nil
564: 			m.pendingWaveAbortAction = nil
565: 			m.pendingWaveNextAction = nil
566: 			m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile = ""
567: 			return m, abortAction
568: 		}
569: 		// Pre-intercept 'enter' as an alias for the confirm key.
570: 		// ConfirmationOverlay.HandleKey only handles ConfirmKey ("y"/"r"), not "enter".
571: 		effectiveMsg := msg
572: 		if msg.Code == tea.KeyEnter {
573: 			if co, ok := m.overlays.Current().(*overlay.ConfirmationOverlay); ok {
574: 				effectiveMsg = tea.KeyPressMsg{Text: co.ConfirmKey, Code: rune(co.ConfirmKey[0])}
575: 			}
576: 		}
577: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(effectiveMsg)
578: 		if result.Dismissed {
579: 			if result.Submitted {
580: 				// Confirmed (ConfirmKey pressed).
581: 				action := m.pendingConfirmAction
582: 				m.state = stateDefault
583: 				m.pendingConfirmAction = nil
584: 				m.pendingWaveAbortAction = nil
585: 				m.pendingWaveNextAction = nil
586: 				m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile = ""
587: 				// Return the action as a tea.Cmd so bubbletea runs it asynchronously.
588: 				// This prevents blocking the UI during I/O (git push, etc.).
589: 				return m, action
590: 			}
591: 			// Cancelled (CancelKey or Esc).
592: 			cancelKey := result.Action // Action holds the key that triggered cancel
593: 			if cancelKey == "" {
594: 				// Esc dismiss — preserve everything, allow re-prompt on next tick (after cooldown).
595: 				if m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile != "" {
596: 					if orch, ok := m.waveOrchestrators[m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile]; ok {
597: 						orch.ResetConfirm()
598: 					}
599: 					m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile = ""
600: 					m.waveConfirmDismissedAt = time.Now()
601: 				}
602: 				// Planner signal esc: same as cancel — signal is consumed, can't re-trigger.
603: 				if m.pendingPlannerTaskFile != "" {
604: 					m.plannerPrompted[m.pendingPlannerTaskFile] = true
605: 					m.killExistingPlanAgent(m.pendingPlannerTaskFile, session.AgentTypePlanner)
606: 					_ = m.saveAllInstances()
607: 					m.updateNavPanelStatus()
608: 					m.pendingPlannerInstanceTitle = ""
609: 					m.pendingPlannerTaskFile = ""
610: 				}
611: 				m.state = stateDefault
612: 				m.pendingConfirmAction = nil
613: 				m.pendingWaveAbortAction = nil
614: 				m.pendingWaveNextAction = nil
615: 				return m, nil
616: 			}
617: 			// CancelKey pressed — check if this is the failed-wave dialog where CancelKey="n" fires advance.
618: 			if m.pendingWaveNextAction != nil {
619: 				nextAction := m.pendingWaveNextAction
620: 				m.state = stateDefault
621: 				m.pendingConfirmAction = nil
622: 				m.pendingWaveAbortAction = nil
623: 				m.pendingWaveNextAction = nil
624: 				m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile = ""
625: 				return m, nextAction
626: 			}
627: 			// "No" — user explicitly declined.
628: 			// Reset the orchestrator confirm latch when the user cancels a wave prompt,
629: 			// so the prompt can reappear on the next metadata tick (fixes deadlock).
630: 			if m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile != "" {
631: 				if orch, ok := m.waveOrchestrators[m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile]; ok {
632: 					orch.ResetConfirm()
633: 				}
634: 				m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile = ""
635: 			}
636: 			// Planner signal "no": kill planner instance, mark prompted, leave plan ready.
637: 			if m.pendingPlannerTaskFile != "" {
638: 				m.plannerPrompted[m.pendingPlannerTaskFile] = true
639: 				m.killExistingPlanAgent(m.pendingPlannerTaskFile, session.AgentTypePlanner)
640: 				_ = m.saveAllInstances()
641: 				m.updateNavPanelStatus()
642: 				m.pendingPlannerInstanceTitle = ""
643: 				m.pendingPlannerTaskFile = ""
644: 			}
645: 			m.state = stateDefault
646: 			m.pendingConfirmAction = nil
647: 			m.pendingWaveAbortAction = nil
648: 			m.pendingWaveNextAction = nil
649: 			return m, nil
650: 		}
651: 		return m, nil
652: 	}
653: 
654: 	// Handle permission prompt state
655: 	if m.state == statePermission {
656: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
657: 			m.state = stateDefault
658: 			return m, nil
659: 		}
660: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
661: 		if result.Dismissed {
662: 			if result.Submitted {
663: 				// Read the pattern/description captured at detection time.
664: 				cacheKey := config.CacheKey(m.pendingPermissionPattern, m.pendingPermissionDesc)
665: 				inst := m.pendingPermissionInstance
666: 
667: 				// Map action string to PermissionChoice.
668: 				var choice overlay.PermissionChoice
669: 				switch result.Action {
670: 				case "allow_always":
671: 					choice = overlay.PermissionAllowAlways
672: 				case "reject":
673: 					choice = overlay.PermissionReject
674: 				default:
675: 					choice = overlay.PermissionAllowOnce
676: 				}
677: 
678: 				// Cache "allow always" decisions
679: 				if choice == overlay.PermissionAllowAlways && cacheKey != "" && m.permissionStore != nil {
680: 					m.permissionStore.Remember(m.activeProject(), cacheKey)
681: 				}
682: 
683: 				m.state = stateDefault
684: 
685: 				// Guard against re-trigger: the pane still shows the permission
686: 				// prompt for a few ticks while the key sequence propagates.
687: 				// Without this, the next metadata tick re-opens the modal.
688: 				if inst != nil {
689: 					guardKey := cacheKey
690: 					if guardKey == "" {
691: 						guardKey = "__handled__"
692: 					}
693: 					m.permissionHandled[inst] = guardKey
694: 				}
695: 
696: 				if inst != nil {
697: 					// overlay.PermissionChoice and tmux.PermissionChoice share the same
698: 					// iota ordering, so a direct cast is safe.
699: 					capturedInst := inst
700: 					capturedChoice := tmux.PermissionChoice(choice)
701: 					// Emit audit event for permission answered.
702: 					choiceStr := "allow once"
703: 					switch choice {
704: 					case overlay.PermissionAllowAlways:
705: 						choiceStr = "allow always"
706: 					case overlay.PermissionReject:
707: 						choiceStr = "reject"
708: 					}
709: 					m.audit(auditlog.EventPermissionAnswered, choiceStr,
710: 						auditlog.WithInstance(inst.Title),
711: 					)
712: 					m.pendingPermissionInstance = nil
713: 					m.pendingPermissionPattern = ""
714: 					m.pendingPermissionDesc = ""
715: 					return m, func() tea.Msg {
716: 						capturedInst.SendPermissionResponse(capturedChoice)
717: 						return nil
718: 					}
719: 				}
720: 			}
721: 			// Esc dismiss — also guard so the same prompt doesn't re-open.
722: 			if m.pendingPermissionInstance != nil {
723: 				guardKey := m.pendingPermissionPattern
724: 				if guardKey == "" {
725: 					guardKey = "__handled__"
726: 				}
727: 				m.permissionHandled[m.pendingPermissionInstance] = guardKey
728: 			}
729: 			m.pendingPermissionInstance = nil
730: 			m.pendingPermissionPattern = ""
731: 			m.pendingPermissionDesc = ""
732: 			m.state = stateDefault
733: 			return m, nil
734: 		}
735: 		return m, nil
736: 	}
737: 
738: 	// Handle new plan description state
739: 	if m.state == stateNewPlan {
740: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
741: 			m.state = stateDefault
742: 			return m, nil
743: 		}
744: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
745: 		if result.Dismissed {
746: 			if result.Submitted {
747: 				description := strings.TrimSpace(result.Value)
748: 				if description == "" {
749: 					m.state = stateDefault
750: 					m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
751: 					return m, m.handleError(fmt.Errorf("description cannot be empty"))
752: 				}
753: 				// Set heuristic title as fallback; AI title will replace it when it arrives
754: 				m.pendingPlanName = heuristicPlanTitle(description)
755: 				m.pendingPlanDesc = description
756: 
757: 				// If the first line is already a viable slug, skip AI derivation
758: 				if firstLineIsViableSlug(description) {
759: 					topicNames := m.getTopicNames()
760: 					topicNames = append([]string{"(No topic)"}, topicNames...)
761: 					pickerTitle := fmt.Sprintf("assign to topic for '%s'", m.pendingPlanName)
762: 					po := overlay.NewPickerOverlay(pickerTitle, topicNames)
763: 					po.SetAllowCustom(true)
764: 					m.overlays.Show(po)
765: 					m.state = stateNewPlanTopic
766: 					return m, nil
767: 				}
768: 
769: 				m.state = stateNewPlanDeriving
770: 				if m.toastManager != nil {
771: 					m.toastManager.Info("deriving title...")
772: 					return m, tea.Batch(aiDerivePlanTitleCmd(description), m.toastTickCmd())
773: 				}
774: 				return m, aiDerivePlanTitleCmd(description)
775: 			}
776: 			m.state = stateDefault
777: 			m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
778: 			return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
779: 		}
780: 		return m, nil
781: 	}
782: 
783: 	// Handle deriving state — waiting for AI title before showing topic picker
784: 	if m.state == stateNewPlanDeriving {
785: 		if msg.Code == tea.KeyEscape {
786: 			m.state = stateDefault
787: 			m.pendingPlanName = ""
788: 			m.pendingPlanDesc = ""
789: 			return m, nil
790: 		}
791: 		return m, nil
792: 	}
793: 
794: 	// Handle new plan topic picker state
795: 	if m.state == stateNewPlanTopic {
796: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
797: 			m.state = stateDefault
798: 			m.pendingPlanName = ""
799: 			m.pendingPlanDesc = ""
800: 			return m, nil
801: 		}
802: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
803: 		if result.Dismissed {
804: 			topic := ""
805: 			if result.Submitted {
806: 				picked := result.Value
807: 				if picked != "(No topic)" {
808: 					topic = picked
809: 				}
810: 			}
811: 			if err := m.createTaskEntry(m.pendingPlanName, m.pendingPlanDesc, topic); err != nil {
812: 				m.state = stateDefault
813: 				m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
814: 				m.pendingPlanName = ""
815: 				m.pendingPlanDesc = ""
816: 				return m, m.handleError(err)
817: 			}
818: 			m.loadTaskState()
819: 			m.updateSidebarTasks()
820: 			m.state = stateDefault
821: 			m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
822: 			m.pendingPlanName = ""
823: 			m.pendingPlanDesc = ""
824: 			return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
825: 		}
826: 		return m, nil
827: 	}
828: 
829: 	// Handle spawn agent form state
830: 	if m.state == stateSpawnAgent {
831: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
832: 			m.state = stateDefault
833: 			return m, nil
834: 		}
835: 		// Type-assert before HandleKey to access Name/Branch/WorkPath after dismiss.
836: 		fo, _ := m.overlays.Current().(*overlay.FormOverlay)
837: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
838: 		if result.Dismissed {
839: 			if result.Submitted && fo != nil {
840: 				name := fo.Name()
841: 				branch := fo.Branch()
842: 				workPath := fo.WorkPath()
843: 
844: 				if name == "" {
845: 					m.state = stateDefault
846: 					m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
847: 					return m, m.handleError(fmt.Errorf("name cannot be empty"))
848: 				}
849: 
850: 				return m.spawnAdHocAgent(name, branch, workPath)
851: 			}
852: 			m.state = stateDefault
853: 			m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
854: 			return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
855: 		}
856: 		return m, nil
857: 	}
858: 
859: 	// Handle change-topic picker for existing plans
860: 	if m.state == stateChangeTopic {
861: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
862: 			m.state = stateDefault
863: 			m.pendingChangeTopicTask = ""
864: 			return m, nil
865: 		}
866: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
867: 		if result.Dismissed {
868: 			if result.Submitted && m.taskState != nil && m.pendingChangeTopicTask != "" {
869: 				picked := result.Value
870: 				newTopic := ""
871: 				if picked != "(No topic)" {
872: 					newTopic = picked
873: 				}
874: 				if err := m.taskState.SetTopic(m.pendingChangeTopicTask, newTopic); err != nil {
875: 					m.state = stateDefault
876: 					m.pendingChangeTopicTask = ""
877: 					return m, m.handleError(err)
878: 				}
879: 				m.updateSidebarTasks()
880: 			}
881: 			m.state = stateDefault
882: 			m.pendingChangeTopicTask = ""
883: 			return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
884: 		}
885: 		return m, nil
886: 	}
887: 
888: 	// Handle set-status picker for force-overriding a plan's status
889: 	if m.state == stateSetStatus {
890: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
891: 			m.state = stateDefault
892: 			m.pendingSetStatusTask = ""
893: 			return m, nil
894: 		}
895: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
896: 		if result.Dismissed {
897: 			if result.Submitted && m.taskState != nil && m.pendingSetStatusTask != "" {
898: 				picked := result.Value
899: 				if picked != "" {
900: 					if err := m.taskState.ForceSetStatus(m.pendingSetStatusTask, taskstate.Status(picked)); err != nil {
901: 						m.state = stateDefault
902: 						m.pendingSetStatusTask = ""
903: 						return m, m.handleError(err)
904: 					}
905: 					m.audit(auditlog.EventPlanTransition, "manual override → "+picked,
906: 						auditlog.WithPlan(m.pendingSetStatusTask),
907: 						auditlog.WithDetail("manual override"))
908: 					m.loadTaskState()
909: 					m.updateSidebarTasks()
910: 					m.toastManager.Success(fmt.Sprintf("status → %s", picked))
911: 					m.state = stateDefault
912: 					m.pendingSetStatusTask = ""
913: 					return m, tea.Batch(tea.RequestWindowSize, m.toastTickCmd())
914: 				}
915: 			}
916: 			m.state = stateDefault
917: 			m.pendingSetStatusTask = ""
918: 			return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
919: 		}
920: 		return m, nil
921: 	}
922: 
923: 	// Handle ClickUp search input state
924: 	if m.state == stateClickUpSearch {
925: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
926: 			m.state = stateDefault
927: 			return m, nil
928: 		}
929: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
930: 		if result.Dismissed {
931: 			if result.Submitted {
932: 				query := strings.TrimSpace(result.Value)
933: 				if query != "" {
934: 					m.state = stateClickUpFetching
935: 					m.toastManager.Info("searching clickup...")
936: 					return m, tea.Batch(m.searchClickUp(query), m.toastTickCmd())
937: 				}
938: 			}
939: 			m.state = stateDefault
940: 		}
941: 		return m, nil
942: 	}
943: 
944: 	// Handle ClickUp task picker state
945: 	if m.state == stateClickUpPicker {
946: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
947: 			m.state = stateDefault
948: 			return m, nil
949: 		}
950: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
951: 		if result.Dismissed {
952: 			if result.Submitted {
953: 				selected := result.Value
954: 				if selected != "" {
955: 					for _, r := range m.clickUpResults {
956: 						label := r.ID + " · " + r.Name
957: 						if strings.HasPrefix(selected, label) {
958: 							m.state = stateClickUpFetching
959: 							m.toastManager.Info("fetching task details...")
960: 							return m, tea.Batch(m.fetchClickUpTaskWithTimeout(r.ID), m.toastTickCmd())
961: 						}
962: 					}
963: 				}
964: 			}
965: 			m.state = stateDefault
966: 		}
967: 		return m, nil
968: 	}
969: 
970: 	if m.state == stateClickUpFetching {
971: 		return m, nil
972: 	}
973: 
974: 	// Handle ClickUp workspace picker state
975: 	if m.state == stateClickUpWorkspacePicker {
976: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
977: 			m.state = stateDefault
978: 			return m, nil
979: 		}
980: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
981: 		if result.Dismissed {
982: 			if result.Submitted {
983: 				selected := result.Value
984: 				if selected != "" && m.clickUpImporter != nil {
985: 					// Resolve label ("name (id)") back to bare workspace ID.
986: 					wsID := selected
987: 					if id, ok := m.clickUpWorkspaceMap[selected]; ok {
988: 						wsID = id
989: 					}
990: 					m.clickUpImporter.SetWorkspaceID(wsID)
991: 					// Persist choice so user isn't prompted again for this project.
992: 					if err := clickup.SaveProjectConfig(m.activeRepoPath, &clickup.ProjectConfig{
993: 						WorkspaceID: wsID,
994: 					}); err != nil {
995: 						log.WarningLog.Printf("failed to save clickup workspace config: %v", err)
996: 					}
997: 					query := m.clickUpPendingQuery
998: 					m.clickUpPendingQuery = ""
999: 					m.clickUpWorkspaceMap = nil
1000: 					m.state = stateClickUpFetching
1001: 					m.toastManager.Info("searching clickup...")
1002: 					return m, tea.Batch(m.searchClickUp(query), m.toastTickCmd())
1003: 				}
1004: 			}
1005: 			m.state = stateDefault
1006: 			m.clickUpPendingQuery = ""
1007: 			m.clickUpWorkspaceMap = nil
1008: 		}
1009: 		return m, nil
1010: 	}
1011: 
1012: 	if m.state == stateTmuxBrowser {
1013: 		if !m.overlays.IsActive() {
1014: 			m.state = stateDefault
1015: 			return m, nil
1016: 		}
1017: 		browser, _ := m.overlays.Current().(*overlay.TmuxBrowserOverlay)
1018: 		result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
1019: 		if result.Dismissed {
1020: 			m.state = stateDefault
1021: 			return m.handleTmuxBrowserAction(browser, result.Action)
1022: 		}
1023: 		// Handle non-dismissed actions (e.g. "kill" keeps the browser open for
1024: 		// multi-kill workflow — the action handler decides whether to dismiss).
1025: 		if result.Action != "" {
1026: 			return m.handleTmuxBrowserAction(browser, result.Action)
1027: 		}
1028: 		return m, nil
1029: 	}
1030: 
1031: 	// Handle search state — allows typing to filter AND arrow keys to navigate
1032: 	if m.state == stateSearch {
1033: 		switch {
1034: 		case msg.String() == "esc":
1035: 			m.nav.DeactivateSearch()
1036: 			m.state = stateDefault
1037: 			return m, nil
1038: 		case msg.String() == "enter":
1039: 			m.nav.DeactivateSearch()
1040: 			m.state = stateDefault
1041: 			return m, nil
1042: 		case msg.String() == "up":
1043: 			m.nav.Up()
1044: 			return m, m.instanceChanged()
1045: 		case msg.String() == "down":
1046: 			m.nav.Down()
1047: 			return m, m.instanceChanged()
1048: 		case msg.Code == tea.KeyBackspace:
1049: 			q := m.nav.GetSearchQuery()
1050: 			if len(q) > 0 {
1051: 				runes := []rune(q)
1052: 				m.nav.SetSearchQuery(string(runes[:len(runes)-1]))
1053: 			}
1054: 			return m, nil
1055: 		case msg.Code == tea.KeySpace:
1056: 			m.nav.SetSearchQuery(m.nav.GetSearchQuery() + " ")
1057: 			return m, nil
1058: 		case len(msg.Text) > 0:
1059: 			m.nav.SetSearchQuery(m.nav.GetSearchQuery() + msg.Text)
1060: 			return m, nil
1061: 		}
1062: 		return m, nil
1063: 	}
1064: 
1065: 	// Exit scrolling mode when ESC is pressed and preview pane is in scrolling mode
1066: 	// Check if Escape key was pressed and we're not in the diff tab (meaning we're in preview tab)
1067: 	// Always check for escape key first to ensure it doesn't get intercepted elsewhere
1068: 	if msg.Code == tea.KeyEscape {
1069: 		// Exit document mode (plan viewer) on Esc
1070: 		if m.tabbedWindow.IsDocumentMode() {
1071: 			m.tabbedWindow.ClearDocumentMode()
1072: 			return m, m.instanceChanged()
1073: 		}
1074: 		// If in preview tab and in scroll mode, exit scroll mode
1075: 		if !m.tabbedWindow.IsInDiffTab() && m.tabbedWindow.IsPreviewInScrollMode() {
1076: 			// Use the selected instance from the list
1077: 			selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1078: 			err := m.tabbedWindow.ResetPreviewToNormalMode(selected)
1079: 			if err != nil {
1080: 				return m, m.handleError(err)
1081: 			}
1082: 			return m, m.instanceChanged()
1083: 		}
1084: 	}
1085: 
1086: 	// Forward key events to the viewport when in document or scroll mode.
1087: 	// This enables viewport native keys like PgUp/PgDn and arrow keys.
1088: 	if (m.tabbedWindow.IsDocumentMode() || m.tabbedWindow.IsPreviewInScrollMode()) &&
1089: 		m.tabbedWindow.GetActiveTab() == ui.PreviewTab {
1090: 		cmd := m.tabbedWindow.ViewportUpdate(msg)
1091: 
1092: 		// Keep existing shift+up/down behavior as fallback handlers.
1093: 		if msg.String() != "shift+up" && msg.String() != "shift+down" {
1094: 			if m.tabbedWindow.ViewportHandlesKey(msg) {
1095: 				return m, cmd
1096: 			}
1097: 		}
1098: 
1099: 		if cmd != nil {
1100: 			return m, cmd
1101: 		}
1102: 	}
1103: 
1104: 	// Ctrl+Up/Down: cycle through active instances (wrapping)
1105: 	if msg.Code == tea.KeyUp && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) || msg.Code == tea.KeyDown && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) {
1106: 		if msg.Code == tea.KeyUp && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) {
1107: 			m.nav.CyclePrevActive()
1108: 		} else {
1109: 			m.nav.CycleNextActive()
1110: 		}
1111: 		return m, m.instanceChanged()
1112: 	}
1113: 
1114: 	// Ctrl+U/D: half-page scroll in agent session preview
1115: 	if msg.Code == 'u' && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) || msg.Code == 'd' && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) {
1116: 		if msg.Code == 'u' && msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) {
1117: 			m.tabbedWindow.HalfPageUp()
1118: 		} else {
1119: 			m.tabbedWindow.HalfPageDown()
1120: 		}
1121: 		return m, nil
1122: 	}
1123: 
1124: 	// Handle quit commands first
1125: 	if msg.String() == "ctrl+c" || msg.String() == "q" {
1126: 		return m.handleQuit()
1127: 	}
1128: 
1129: 	// Shift+Tab: reverse focus ring cycle (don't call instanceChanged — it auto-switches tabs)
1130: 	if msg.String() == "shift+tab" {
1131: 		m.prevFocusSlot()
1132: 		return m, nil
1133: 	}
1134: 
1135: 	// Delete key: dismiss a finished (non-running) instance from the list.
1136: 	if msg.Code == tea.KeyDelete || msg.Code == tea.KeyBackspace {
1137: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1138: 		if selected != nil && (selected.Exited || (selected.Status != session.Running && selected.Status != session.Loading)) {
1139: 			title := selected.Title
1140: 			m.nav.Remove()
1141: 			m.removeFromAllInstances(title)
1142: 			_ = m.saveAllInstances()
1143: 			m.updateNavPanelStatus()
1144: 			return m, tea.Batch(tea.RequestWindowSize, m.instanceChanged())
1145: 		}
1146: 		return m, nil
1147: 	}
1148: 
1149: 	name, ok := keys.GlobalKeyStringsMap[msg.String()]
1150: 	if !ok {
1151: 		return m, nil
1152: 	}
1153: 
1154: 	switch name {
1155: 	case keys.KeyHelp:
1156: 		return m.showHelpScreen(helpTypeGeneral{}, nil)
1157: 	case keys.KeyPrompt:
1158: 		if m.tmuxSessionCount >= GlobalInstanceLimit {
1159: 			return m, m.handleError(
1160: 				fmt.Errorf("you can't create more than %d instances (%d tmux sessions active)", GlobalInstanceLimit, m.tmuxSessionCount))
1161: 		}
1162: 		instance, err := session.NewInstance(session.InstanceOptions{
1163: 			Title:   "",
1164: 			Path:    m.activeRepoPath,
1165: 			Program: m.programForAgent(""),
1166: 		})
1167: 		if err != nil {
1168: 			return m, m.handleError(err)
1169: 		}
1170: 
1171: 		m.addInstanceFinalizer(instance, m.nav.AddInstance(instance))
1172: 		m.newInstance = instance
1173: 		m.nav.SetSelectedInstance(m.nav.NumInstances() - 1)
1174: 		m.state = stateNew
1175: 		m.menu.SetState(ui.StateNewInstance)
1176: 		m.promptAfterName = true
1177: 
1178: 		return m, nil
1179: 	case keys.KeyNewSkipPermissions:
1180: 		if m.tmuxSessionCount >= GlobalInstanceLimit {
1181: 			return m, m.handleError(
1182: 				fmt.Errorf("you can't create more than %d instances (%d tmux sessions active)", GlobalInstanceLimit, m.tmuxSessionCount))
1183: 		}
1184: 		instance, err := session.NewInstance(session.InstanceOptions{
1185: 			Title:           "",
1186: 			Path:            m.activeRepoPath,
1187: 			Program:         m.programForAgent(""),
1188: 			SkipPermissions: true,
1189: 		})
1190: 		if err != nil {
1191: 			return m, m.handleError(err)
1192: 		}
1193: 
1194: 		m.addInstanceFinalizer(instance, m.nav.AddInstance(instance))
1195: 		m.newInstance = instance
1196: 		m.nav.SetSelectedInstance(m.nav.NumInstances() - 1)
1197: 		m.state = stateNew
1198: 		m.menu.SetState(ui.StateNewInstance)
1199: 
1200: 		return m, nil
1201: 	case keys.KeyUp:
1202: 		m.tabbedWindow.ClearDocumentMode()
1203: 		if m.focusSlot != slotNav {
1204: 			m.setFocusSlot(slotNav)
1205: 		}
1206: 		m.nav.Up()
1207: 		return m, m.instanceChanged()
1208: 	case keys.KeyDown:
1209: 		m.tabbedWindow.ClearDocumentMode()
1210: 		if m.focusSlot != slotNav {
1211: 			m.setFocusSlot(slotNav)
1212: 		}
1213: 		m.nav.Down()
1214: 		return m, m.instanceChanged()
1215: 	case keys.KeyTab:
1216: 		m.nextFocusSlot()
1217: 		return m, nil
1218: 	case keys.KeySpace:
1219: 		if m.focusSlot == slotNav && m.nav.GetSelectedID() == ui.SidebarImportClickUp {
1220: 			m.state = stateClickUpSearch
1221: 			tio := overlay.NewTextInputOverlay("enter clickup id or url", "")
1222: 			tio.SetSize(50, 1)
1223: 			m.overlays.Show(tio)
1224: 			return m, nil
1225: 		}
1226: 		if m.focusSlot == slotNav && m.nav.ToggleSelectedExpand() {
1227: 			return m, nil
1228: 		}
1229: 		return m.openContextMenu()
1230: 	case keys.KeyInfoTab:
1231: 		// Switch visible tab to info without stealing sidebar focus.
1232: 		if m.tabbedWindow.IsInInfoTab() {
1233: 			return m, nil
1234: 		}
1235: 		m.tabbedWindow.SetActiveTab(ui.InfoTab)
1236: 		return m, nil
1237: 	case keys.KeyTabAgent, keys.KeyTabDiff, keys.KeyTabInfo:
1238: 		return m.switchToTab(name)
1239: 	case keys.KeySendPrompt:
1240: 		// Ensure the agent tab is visible when entering focus mode.
1241: 		m.tabbedWindow.SetActiveTab(ui.PreviewTab)
1242: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1243: 		// When a plan header is selected (no instance), find the best instance for that plan.
1244: 		if selected == nil {
1245: 			if pf := m.nav.GetSelectedPlanFile(); pf != "" {
1246: 				if best := m.nav.FindPlanInstance(pf); best != nil {
1247: 					m.nav.SelectInstance(best)
1248: 					selected = best
1249: 				}
1250: 			}
1251: 		}
1252: 		if selected == nil || !selected.Started() || selected.Paused() {
1253: 			return m, nil
1254: 		}
1255: 		return m, m.enterFocusMode()
1256: 	case keys.KeySendYes:
1257: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1258: 		if selected == nil || !selected.Started() || selected.Paused() || !selected.PromptDetected {
1259: 			return m, nil
1260: 		}
1261: 		selected.QueuedPrompt = "yes"
1262: 		selected.AwaitingWork = true
1263: 		return m, nil
1264: 	case keys.KeyKill:
1265: 		// Soft kill: terminate tmux session only, keep instance in list.
1266: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1267: 		if selected == nil || !selected.Started() || selected.Paused() || selected.Exited {
1268: 			return m, nil
1269: 		}
1270: 		m.audit(auditlog.EventAgentKilled, "killed instance",
1271: 			auditlog.WithInstance(selected.Title),
1272: 			auditlog.WithAgent(selected.AgentType),
1273: 			auditlog.WithPlan(selected.TaskFile),
1274: 		)
1275: 		inst := selected
1276: 		return m, func() tea.Msg {
1277: 			inst.StopTmux()
1278: 			inst.SetStatus(session.Ready)
1279: 			return instanceChangedMsg{}
1280: 		}
1281: 	case keys.KeyAbort:
1282: 		// Full abort: kill tmux, remove worktree, remove from list + persistence.
1283: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1284: 		if selected == nil {
1285: 			return m, nil
1286: 		}
1287: 
1288: 		// Pre-kill checks run async; model mutations happen in Update via killInstanceMsg.
1289: 		title := selected.Title
1290: 		killAction := func() tea.Msg {
1291: 			worktree, err := selected.GetGitWorktree()
1292: 			if err != nil {
1293: 				return err
1294: 			}
1295: 			checkedOut, err := worktree.IsBranchCheckedOut()
1296: 			if err != nil {
1297: 				return err
1298: 			}
1299: 			if checkedOut {
1300: 				return fmt.Errorf("instance %s is currently checked out", selected.Title)
1301: 			}
1302: 			return killInstanceMsg{title: title}
1303: 		}
1304: 
1305: 		// Show confirmation modal
1306: 		message := fmt.Sprintf("[!] abort session '%s'? this removes the worktree.", selected.Title)
1307: 		return m, m.confirmAction(message, killAction)
1308: 	case keys.KeySubmit:
1309: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1310: 		if selected == nil {
1311: 			return m, nil
1312: 		}
1313: 
1314: 		// Create the push action as a tea.Cmd
1315: 		pushAction := func() tea.Msg {
1316: 			// Default commit message with timestamp
1317: 			commitMsg := fmt.Sprintf("[kas] update from '%s' on %s", selected.Title, time.Now().Format(time.RFC822))
1318: 			worktree, err := selected.GetGitWorktree()
1319: 			if err != nil {
1320: 				return err
1321: 			}
1322: 			if err = worktree.PushChanges(commitMsg, true); err != nil {
1323: 				return err
1324: 			}
1325: 			return nil
1326: 		}
1327: 
1328: 		// Show confirmation modal
1329: 		message := fmt.Sprintf("[!] push changes from session '%s'?", selected.Title)
1330: 		return m, m.confirmAction(message, pushAction)
1331: 	case keys.KeyCreatePR:
1332: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1333: 		if selected == nil {
1334: 			return m, nil
1335: 		}
1336: 		m.state = statePRTitle
1337: 		tio := overlay.NewTextInputOverlay("pr title", selected.Title)
1338: 		tio.SetSize(60, 3)
1339: 		m.overlays.Show(tio)
1340: 		return m, nil
1341: 	case keys.KeyCheckout:
1342: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1343: 		if selected == nil {
1344: 			return m, nil
1345: 		}
1346: 
1347: 		// Show help screen before pausing
1348: 		m.showHelpScreen(helpTypeInstanceCheckout{}, func() {
1349: 			if err := selected.Pause(); err != nil {
1350: 				m.handleError(err)
1351: 			}
1352: 			m.instanceChanged()
1353: 		})
1354: 		return m, nil
1355: 	case keys.KeyResume:
1356: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1357: 		if selected == nil {
1358: 			return m, nil
1359: 		}
1360: 		if err := selected.Resume(); err != nil {
1361: 			return m, m.handleError(err)
1362: 		}
1363: 		return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
1364: 	case keys.KeyEnter:
1365: 		// Sidebar always has focus: handle plan/instance interactions first.
1366: 		if m.nav.GetSelectedID() == ui.SidebarImportClickUp {
1367: 			m.state = stateClickUpSearch
1368: 			tio := overlay.NewTextInputOverlay("enter clickup id or url", "")
1369: 			tio.SetSize(50, 1)
1370: 			m.overlays.Show(tio)
1371: 			return m, nil
1372: 		}
1373: 		// Plan header or plan file: open plan context menu
1374: 		if m.nav.IsSelectedPlanHeader() {
1375: 			return m.openTaskContextMenu()
1376: 		}
1377: 		if planFile := m.nav.GetSelectedPlanFile(); planFile != "" {
1378: 			return m.openTaskContextMenu()
1379: 		}
1380: 		if m.nav.NumInstances() == 0 {
1381: 			return m, nil
1382: 		}
1383: 		selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
1384: 		if selected == nil || !selected.Started() || selected.Paused() {
1385: 			return m, nil
1386: 		}
1387: 		if !selected.TmuxAlive() {
1388: 			m.toastManager.Error(fmt.Sprintf("session for '%s' is not running", selected.Title))
1389: 			return m, m.toastTickCmd()
1390: 		}
1391: 		// Show help screen before attaching
1392: 		m.showHelpScreen(helpTypeInstanceAttach{}, func() {
1393: 			ch, err := m.nav.Attach()
1394: 			if err != nil {
1395: 				m.handleError(err)
1396: 				return
1397: 			}
1398: 			<-ch
1399: 			m.state = stateDefault
1400: 		})
1401: 		return m, nil
1402: 	case keys.KeyFocusList:
1403: 		// t key always jumps directly to the instance list — no-op when list is hidden.
1404: 		if m.nav.TotalInstances() > 0 {
1405: 			m.setFocusSlot(slotNav)
1406: 		}
1407: 		return m, nil
1408: 	case keys.KeyViewPlan:
1409: 		return m.viewSelectedPlan()
1410: 	case keys.KeyToggleSidebar:
1411: 		if m.sidebarHidden {
1412: 			// Show sidebar, keep current focus
1413: 			m.sidebarHidden = false
1414: 		} else {
1415: 			// Hide sidebar
1416: 			m.sidebarHidden = true
1417: 			// If sidebar was focused, move focus to agent tab
1418: 			if m.focusSlot == slotNav {
1419: 				m.setFocusSlot(slotAgent)
1420: 			}
1421: 		}
1422: 		return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
1423: 	case keys.KeyAuditToggle:
1424: 		if m.auditPane != nil {
1425: 			m.auditPane.ToggleVisible()
1426: 		}
1427: 		return m, tea.RequestWindowSize
1428: 	case keys.KeyArrowLeft:
1429: 		// Sidebar always has focus — no-op.
1430: 		return m, nil
1431: 	case keys.KeyArrowRight:
1432: 		// Toggle expand/collapse on the selected sidebar item (same as space's expand behavior).
1433: 		if m.nav.GetSelectedID() == ui.SidebarImportClickUp {
1434: 			m.state = stateClickUpSearch
1435: 			tio := overlay.NewTextInputOverlay("enter clickup id or url", "")
1436: 			tio.SetSize(50, 1)
1437: 			m.overlays.Show(tio)

1440: 		// Right on an instance while in the info tab: jump to the agent tab.

1444: 		}
1445: 		m.nav.ToggleSelectedExpand()

1447: 	case keys.KeyNewPlan:
1448: 		m.state = stateNewPlan
1449: 		tio := overlay.NewTextInputOverlay("new plan", "")
1450: 		tio.SetMultiline(true)
1451: 		tio.SetPlaceholder("describe what you want to work on...")
1452: 		tio.SetSize(70, 8)
1453: 		m.overlays.Show(tio)
1454: 		return m, nil
1455: 	case keys.KeySpawnAgent:
1456: 		if m.tmuxSessionCount >= GlobalInstanceLimit {
1457: 			return m, m.handleError(
1458: 				fmt.Errorf("you can't create more than %d instances (%d tmux sessions active)", GlobalInstanceLimit, m.tmuxSessionCount))
1459: 		}
1460: 		m.state = stateSpawnAgent
1461: 		m.overlays.Show(overlay.NewSpawnFormOverlay("spawn agent", 60))
1462: 		return m, nil
1463: 	case keys.KeyTmuxBrowser:

1465: 	case keys.KeySearch:

1473: 	}
1474: }

1476: // keyToBytes translates a Bubble Tea key message to raw bytes for PTY forwarding.
1477: func keyToBytes(msg tea.KeyPressMsg) []byte {
1478: 	// Handle modifier combinations first.
1479: 	if msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModCtrl) {
1480: 		// Ctrl+letter → raw control character byte (0x01..0x1A).
1481: 		if msg.Code >= 'a' && msg.Code <= 'z' {
1482: 			return []byte{byte(msg.Code - 'a' + 1)}
1483: 		}
1484: 	}
1485: 	if msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModShift) {
1486: 		switch msg.Code {
1487: 		case tea.KeyTab:
1488: 			return []byte("\x1b[Z")
1489: 		case tea.KeyUp:
1490: 			return []byte("\x1b[1;2A")
1491: 		case tea.KeyDown:
1492: 			return []byte("\x1b[1;2B")
1493: 		case tea.KeyRight:
1494: 			return []byte("\x1b[1;2C")
1495: 		case tea.KeyLeft:
1496: 			return []byte("\x1b[1;2D")
1497: 		case tea.KeyHome:
1498: 			return []byte("\x1b[1;2H")
1499: 		case tea.KeyEnd:
1500: 			return []byte("\x1b[1;2F")
1501: 		}
1502: 	}
1503: 	if msg.Mod.Contains(tea.ModAlt) && len(msg.Text) > 0 {
1504: 		return append([]byte{0x1b}, []byte(msg.Text)...)
1505: 	}
1506: 
1507: 	// Printable text with no modifiers.
1508: 	if len(msg.Text) > 0 {
1509: 		return []byte(msg.Text)
1510: 	}
1511: 
1512: 	// Special keys (no modifiers).
1513: 	switch msg.Code {
1514: 	case tea.KeyEnter:
1515: 		return []byte{0x0D}
1516: 	case tea.KeyBackspace:
1517: 		return []byte{0x7F}
1518: 	case tea.KeyTab:
1519: 		return []byte{0x09}
1520: 	case tea.KeySpace:
1521: 		return []byte{0x20}
1522: 	case tea.KeyUp:
1523: 		return []byte("\x1b[A")
1524: 	case tea.KeyDown:
1525: 		return []byte("\x1b[B")
1526: 	case tea.KeyRight:
1527: 		return []byte("\x1b[C")
1528: 	case tea.KeyLeft:
1529: 		return []byte("\x1b[D")
1530: 	case tea.KeyDelete:
1531: 		return []byte("\x1b[3~")
1532: 	case tea.KeyEscape:
1533: 		return []byte{0x1b}
1534: 	default:
1535: 		return nil
1536: 	}
1537: }
1538: 
1539: func (m *home) handleError(err error) tea.Cmd {
1540: 	log.ErrorLog.Printf("%v", err)
1541: 	m.toastManager.Error(err.Error())
1542: 	m.audit(auditlog.EventError, err.Error(), auditlog.WithLevel("error"))
1543: 	return m.toastTickCmd()
1544: }
1545: 
1546: // confirmAction shows a confirmation modal and stores the action to execute on confirm.
1547: // The action is a tea.Cmd that will be returned from Update() to run asynchronously —
1548: // never called synchronously, which would block the UI during I/O operations.
1549: func (m *home) confirmAction(message string, action tea.Cmd) tea.Cmd {
1550: 	m.state = stateConfirm
1551: 	m.pendingConfirmAction = action
1552: 
1553: 	co := overlay.NewConfirmationOverlay(message)
1554: 	m.overlays.Show(co)
1555: 
1556: 	return nil
1557: }
1558: 
1559: // waveStandardConfirmAction shows the wave-advance confirmation for a wave with no failures.
1560: // Stores the plan file so the cancel path can reset the orchestrator confirm latch.
1561: func (m *home) waveStandardConfirmAction(message, planFile string, entry taskstate.TaskEntry) {
1562: 	m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile = planFile
1563: 	capturedPlanFile := planFile
1564: 	capturedEntry := entry
1565: 	m.confirmAction(message, func() tea.Msg {
1566: 		return waveAdvanceMsg{planFile: capturedPlanFile, entry: capturedEntry}
1567: 	})
1568: }
1569: 
1570: // waveFailedConfirmAction shows a three-choice dialog for a wave that has failed tasks.
1571: // Keys: r=retry, n=next wave/advance, a=abort. The abort action is stored separately so the
1572: // stateConfirm key handler can dispatch it on 'a'.
1573: func (m *home) waveFailedConfirmAction(message, planFile string, entry taskstate.TaskEntry) {
1574: 	m.pendingWaveConfirmTaskFile = planFile
1575: 	capturedPlanFile := planFile
1576: 	capturedEntry := entry
1577: 
1578: 	m.state = stateConfirm
1579: 	co := overlay.NewConfirmationOverlay(message)
1580: 	co.ConfirmKey = "r"
1581: 	co.CancelKey = "n"
1582: 	co.SetSize(60, 0)
1583: 	m.overlays.Show(co)
1584: 
1585: 	m.pendingConfirmAction = func() tea.Msg {
1586: 		return waveRetryMsg{planFile: capturedPlanFile, entry: capturedEntry}
1587: 	}
1588: 	m.pendingWaveNextAction = func() tea.Msg {
1589: 		return waveAdvanceMsg{planFile: capturedPlanFile, entry: capturedEntry}
1590: 	}
1591: 	m.pendingWaveAbortAction = func() tea.Msg {
1592: 		return waveAbortMsg{planFile: capturedPlanFile}
1593: 	}
1594: }
1595: 
1596: // keydownCallback clears the menu option highlighting after 500ms.
1597: func (m *home) keydownCallback(name keys.KeyName) tea.Cmd {
1598: 	m.menu.Keydown(name)
1599: 	return func() tea.Msg {
1600: 		select {
1601: 		case <-m.ctx.Done():
1602: 		case <-time.After(500 * time.Millisecond):
1603: 		}
1604: 
1605: 		return keyupMsg{}
1606: 	}
1607: }

339: func newHome(ctx context.Context, program string, autoYes bool) *home {
340: 	// Load application config
341: 	appConfig := config.LoadConfig()
342: 
343: 	// Load application state
344: 	appState := config.LoadState()
345: 
346: 	// Initialize storage
347: 	storage, err := session.NewStorage(appState)
348: 	if err != nil {
349: 		fmt.Printf("Failed to initialize storage: %v\n", err)
350: 		os.Exit(1)
351: 	}
352: 
353: 	activeRepoPath, err := filepath.Abs(".")
354: 	if err != nil {
355: 		fmt.Printf("Failed to get current directory: %v\n", err)
356: 		os.Exit(1)
357: 	}
358: 
359: 	project := filepath.Base(activeRepoPath)
360: 	h := &home{
361: 		ctx:                   ctx,
362: 		spinner:               spinner.New(spinner.WithSpinner(spinner.Dot)),
363: 		menu:                  ui.NewMenu(),
364: 		auditPane:             ui.NewAuditPane(),
365: 		statusBar:             ui.NewStatusBar(),
366: 		tabbedWindow:          ui.NewTabbedWindow(ui.NewPreviewPane(), ui.NewDiffPane(), ui.NewInfoPane()),
367: 		storage:               storage,
368: 		appConfig:             appConfig,
369: 		program:               program,
370: 		autoYes:               autoYes,
371: 		state:                 stateDefault,
372: 		appState:              appState,
373: 		activeRepoPath:        activeRepoPath,
374: 		taskStateDir:          filepath.Join(activeRepoPath, "docs", "plans"),
375: 		signalsDir:            filepath.Join(activeRepoPath, ".kasmos", "signals"),
376: 		taskStoreProject:      project,
377: 		instanceFinalizers:    make(map[*session.Instance]func()),
378: 		waveOrchestrators:     make(map[string]*WaveOrchestrator),
379: 		plannerPrompted:       make(map[string]bool),
380: 		coderPushPrompted:     make(map[string]bool),
381: 		pendingReviewFeedback: make(map[string]string),
382: 	}
383: 
384: 	// Always start an embedded task store server. This gives us a local SQLite
385: 	// DB as the single source of truth without requiring a separate process.
386: 	dbPath := taskstore.ResolvedDBPath()
387: 	embSrv, err := taskstore.StartEmbedded(dbPath, 0)
388: 	if err != nil {
389: 		fmt.Printf("Failed to start embedded task store: %v\n", err)
390: 		os.Exit(1)
391: 	}
392: 	h.embeddedServer = embSrv
393: 
394: 	// Default: use the embedded server's URL for the task store client.
395: 	storeURL := embSrv.URL()
396: 	remoteStoreUnreachable := false
397: 
398: 	// If a remote task store is configured, use that URL instead (multi-machine
399: 	// access over tailscale, etc.). The embedded server still runs for audit log
400: 	// DB access via its SQLite store.
401: 	if appConfig.DatabaseURL != "" {
402: 		remoteStore := taskstore.NewHTTPStore(appConfig.DatabaseURL, project)
403: 		if pingErr := remoteStore.Ping(); pingErr != nil {
404: 			log.WarningLog.Printf("remote task store unreachable: %v — falling back to embedded", pingErr)
405: 			remoteStoreUnreachable = true
406: 			// storeURL stays as the embedded server URL
407: 		} else {
408: 			storeURL = appConfig.DatabaseURL
409: 		}
410: 	}
411: 
412: 	h.taskStore = taskstore.NewHTTPStore(storeURL, project)
413: 	h.fsm = taskfsm.New(h.taskStore, project, h.taskStateDir)
414: 
415: 	// One-time migration: import plan-state.json into the DB if it exists.
416: 	// Use the embedded store directly (bypasses HTTP round-trip).
417: 	// Only runs when plan-state.json is present; subsequent boots skip this.
418: 	planStateJSON := filepath.Join(h.taskStateDir, "plan-state.json")
419: 	if _, statErr := os.Stat(planStateJSON); statErr == nil {
420: 		migrated, migrateErr := taskstore.MigrateFromJSON(embSrv.Store(), project, h.taskStateDir)
421: 		if migrateErr != nil {
422: 			log.WarningLog.Printf("plan-state.json migration failed: %v", migrateErr)
423: 		} else {
424: 			log.InfoLog.Printf("migrated %d plans from plan-state.json to DB", migrated)
425: 			if renameErr := os.Rename(planStateJSON, planStateJSON+".migrated"); renameErr != nil {
426: 				log.WarningLog.Printf("failed to rename plan-state.json after migration: %v", renameErr)
427: 			}
428: 		}
429: 	}
430: 
431: 	// Initialize audit logger. Always uses local SQLite regardless of plan
432: 	// store backend — audit events are purely local state.
433: 	if al, err := auditlog.NewSQLiteLogger(dbPath); err != nil {
434: 		log.WarningLog.Printf("audit logger init failed: %v", err)
435: 		h.auditLogger = auditlog.NopLogger()
436: 	} else {
437: 		h.auditLogger = al
438: 	}
439: 
440: 	h.nav = ui.NewNavigationPanel(&h.spinner)
441: 	h.toastManager = overlay.NewToastManager(&h.spinner)
442: 	h.overlays = overlay.NewManager()
443: 
444: 	// Show a warning toast if a remote task store was configured but unreachable
445: 	// (we fell back to the embedded server).
446: 	if remoteStoreUnreachable {
447: 		h.toastManager.Error("remote task store unreachable — using embedded store")
448: 	}
449: 
450: 	permCacheDir := filepath.Join(activeRepoPath, ".kasmos")
451: 	permStore, err := config.NewSQLitePermissionStore(dbPath)
452: 	if err != nil {
453: 		log.WarningLog.Printf("permission store init failed: %v", err)
454: 	} else {
455: 		if migrateErr := config.MigratePermissionCache(permCacheDir, project, permStore); migrateErr != nil {
456: 			log.WarningLog.Printf("permission cache migration failed: %v", migrateErr)
457: 		}
458: 		h.permissionStore = permStore
459: 	}
460: 	h.permissionHandled = make(map[*session.Instance]string)
461: 
462: 	h.tabbedWindow.SetAnimateBanner(appConfig.AnimateBanner)
463: 	h.setFocusSlot(slotNav)
464: 	h.loadTaskState()
465: 
466: 	// Load saved instances
467: 	instances, err := storage.LoadInstances()
468: 	if err != nil {
469: 		fmt.Printf("Failed to load instances: %v\n", err)
470: 		os.Exit(1)
471: 	}
472: 
473: 	h.allInstances = instances
474: 
475: 	// Add instances matching active repo to the nav
476: 	for _, instance := range instances {
477: 		repoPath := instance.GetRepoPath()
478: 		if repoPath == "" || repoPath == h.activeRepoPath {
479: 			h.nav.AddInstance(instance)()
480: 			if autoYes {
481: 				instance.AutoYes = true
482: 			}
483: 		}
484: 	}
485: 
486: 	h.updateSidebarTasks()
487: 
488: 	// Reconstruct in-memory wave orchestrators for plans that were mid-wave
489: 	// when kasmos was last restarted. Must run after loadTaskState and instance load.
490: 	h.rebuildOrphanedOrchestrators()
491: 
492: 	return h
493: }
494: 
495: // activeProject returns the project name derived from the active repo path.
496: // This matches how planstore derives the project name (filepath.Base of the repo path).
497: func (m *home) activeProject() string {
498: 	return filepath.Base(m.activeRepoPath)
499: }
500: 
501: // isUserInOverlay returns true when the user is actively interacting with
502: // any modal overlay. Used to prevent async metadata-tick handlers from
503: // clobbering the active overlay by showing a confirmation dialog.
504: func (m *home) isUserInOverlay() bool {
505: 	switch m.state {
506: 	case stateDefault:
507: 		return false
508: 	}
509: 	return true
510: }
511: 
512: // updateHandleWindowSizeEvent sets the sizes of the components.
513: // The components will try to render inside their bounds.
514: func (m *home) updateHandleWindowSizeEvent(msg tea.WindowSizeMsg) {
515: 	// Two-column layout: nav + preview
516: 	var navWidth int
517: 	if m.sidebarHidden {
518: 		navWidth = 0
519: 	} else {
520: 		navWidth = msg.Width * 30 / 100
521: 		if navWidth < 25 {
522: 			navWidth = 25
523: 		}
524: 	}
525: 	tabsWidth := msg.Width - navWidth
526: 
527: 	// Keep the keybind rail compact and give the saved rows to the three columns.
528: 	menuHeight := 1
529: 	if msg.Height < 2 {
530: 		menuHeight = 0
531: 	}
532: 	statusBarHeight := 1
533: 	contentHeight := msg.Height - menuHeight - statusBarHeight
534: 	if contentHeight < 1 {
535: 		contentHeight = 1
536: 	}
537: 	// Detect actual terminal resize vs spurious tea.RequestWindowSize side-effects.
538: 	termResized := msg.Width != m.termWidth || msg.Height != m.termHeight
539: 
540: 	m.termWidth = msg.Width
541: 	m.termHeight = msg.Height
542: 	m.toastManager.SetSize(msg.Width, msg.Height)
543: 	if m.statusBar != nil {
544: 		m.statusBar.SetSize(msg.Width)
545: 	}
546: 
547: 	m.tabbedWindow.SetSize(tabsWidth, contentHeight)
548: 
549: 	// Nav panel gets full content height — audit pane is rendered inside its border.
550: 	m.nav.SetSize(navWidth, contentHeight)
551: 	if m.auditPane != nil && m.auditPane.Visible() && navWidth > 0 {
552: 		// Size audit pane for the nav panel's inner content area.
553: 		// border (2) + border padding (2) + item padding (2) = 6
554: 		auditInnerW := navWidth - 6
555: 		// Pass full content height — the nav panel clamps to whatever space
556: 		// remains below the list content (active/plans sections + legend).
557: 		auditH := contentHeight
558: 		if !m.auditBootstrapped {
559: 			m.refreshAuditPane() // load historical events on first render
560: 			m.auditBootstrapped = true
561: 		}
562: 		m.auditPane.SetSize(auditInnerW, auditH)
563: 		m.nav.SetAuditView(m.auditPane.String(), m.auditPane.ContentLines())
564: 	} else {
565: 		m.nav.SetAuditView("", 0)
566: 		if m.auditPane != nil {
567: 			m.auditPane.SetSize(0, 0)
568: 		}
569: 	}
570: 
571: 	// Store for mouse hit-testing
572: 	m.navWidth = navWidth
573: 	m.tabsWidth = tabsWidth
574: 	m.contentHeight = contentHeight
575: 
576: 	if navWidth == 0 && m.focusSlot == slotNav {
577: 		m.setFocusSlot(slotAgent)
578: 	}
579: 
580: 	// Only resize overlays when the terminal dimensions actually changed.
581: 	// Many handlers emit tea.RequestWindowSize as a batched side-effect (e.g.
582: 	// instanceStartedMsg) — those fire with the same dimensions and should
583: 	// not overwrite the overlay's explicit sizing.
584: 	if termResized {
585: 		m.overlays.SetSize(msg.Width, msg.Height)
586: 	}
587: 
588: 	previewWidth, previewHeight := m.tabbedWindow.GetPreviewSize()
589: 	if m.previewTerminal != nil {
590: 		m.previewTerminal.Resize(previewWidth, previewHeight)
591: 	}
592: 	if err := m.nav.SetSessionPreviewSize(previewWidth, previewHeight); err != nil {
593: 		log.ErrorLog.Print(err)
594: 	}
595: 	m.menu.SetSize(msg.Width, menuHeight)
596: }
597: 
598: func (m *home) Init() tea.Cmd {
599: 	m.audit(auditlog.EventSessionStarted, "kasmos started")
600: 
601: 	// Upon starting, we want to start the spinner. Whenever we get a spinner.TickMsg, we
602: 	// update the spinner, which sends a new spinner.TickMsg. I think this lasts forever lol.
603: 	return tea.Batch(
604: 		m.spinner.Tick,
605: 		func() tea.Msg {
606: 			time.Sleep(50 * time.Millisecond)
607: 			return previewTickMsg{}
608: 		},
609: 		tickUpdateMetadataCmd,
610: 		m.toastTickCmd(),
611: 		detectClickUpCmd(m.activeRepoPath),
612: 	)
613: }
614: 
615: func (m *home) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
616: 	switch msg := msg.(type) {
617: 	case overlay.ToastTickMsg:
618: 		m.toastManager.Tick()
619: 		if m.toastManager.HasActiveToasts() {
620: 			return m, m.toastTickCmd()
621: 		}
622: 		return m, nil
623: 	case prCreatedMsg:
624: 		m.toastManager.Resolve(m.pendingPRToastID, overlay.ToastSuccess, "PR created!")
625: 		m.pendingPRToastID = ""
626: 		m.audit(auditlog.EventPRCreated, fmt.Sprintf("PR created: %s", msg.prTitle),
627: 			auditlog.WithInstance(msg.instanceTitle),
628: 		)
629: 		return m, m.toastTickCmd()
630: 	case prErrorMsg:
631: 		log.ErrorLog.Printf("%v", msg.err)
632: 		m.toastManager.Resolve(msg.id, overlay.ToastError, msg.err.Error())
633: 		m.pendingPRToastID = ""
634: 		return m, m.toastTickCmd()
635: 	case planRenderedMsg:
636: 		if msg.err != nil {
637: 			return m, m.handleError(msg.err)
638: 		}
639: 		m.cachedPlanFile = msg.planFile
640: 		m.cachedPlanRendered = msg.rendered
641: 		m.tabbedWindow.SetActiveTab(ui.PreviewTab)
642: 		m.tabbedWindow.SetDocumentContent(msg.rendered)
643: 		return m, nil
644: 	case previewTickMsg:
645: 		// If previewTerminal is active, render from it (zero-latency VT emulator).
646: 		if m.previewTerminal != nil && !m.tabbedWindow.IsDocumentMode() {
647: 			if content, changed := m.previewTerminal.Render(); changed {
648: 				m.tabbedWindow.SetPreviewContent(content)
649: 			}
650: 		} else if m.previewTerminal == nil && !m.tabbedWindow.IsDocumentMode() {
651: 			// No terminal — show appropriate fallback state.
652: 			selected := m.nav.GetSelectedInstance()
653: 			if selected != nil && selected.Started() && selected.Status != session.Paused && selected.Status != session.Loading {
654: 				// Instance is running but terminal hasn't attached yet — show connecting indicator.
655: 				m.tabbedWindow.SetConnectingState()
656: 			} else {
657: 				// nil, Loading, or Paused — delegate to UpdatePreview which renders the
658: 				// correct fallback (banner, progress bar, or paused message).
659: 				if err := m.tabbedWindow.UpdatePreview(selected); err != nil {
660: 					log.ErrorLog.Printf("preview update error: %v", err)
661: 				}
662: 			}
663: 		}
664: 		// Advance spring animation every tick (20fps)
665: 		m.tabbedWindow.TickSpring()
666: 		// Banner animation (only when no terminal is active / fallback showing).
667: 		m.previewTickCount++
668: 		if m.previewTickCount%20 == 0 {
669: 			m.tabbedWindow.TickBanner()
670: 		}
671: 		// Use event-driven wakeup when terminal is live, fall back to 50ms poll otherwise.
672: 		term := m.previewTerminal
673: 		return m, func() tea.Msg {
674: 			if term != nil {
675: 				term.WaitForRender(16 * time.Millisecond)
676: 			} else {
677: 				time.Sleep(50 * time.Millisecond)
678: 			}
679: 			return previewTickMsg{}
680: 		}
681: 	case keyupMsg:
682: 		m.menu.ClearKeydown()
683: 		return m, nil
684: 	case clickUpDetectedMsg:
685: 		m.clickUpConfig = &msg.Config
686: 		m.nav.SetClickUpAvailable(true)
687: 		return m, nil
688: 	case clickUpSearchResultMsg:
689: 		if msg.Err != nil {
690: 			// Check if the error is a multiple-workspaces error — show picker instead of failing.
691: 			var mwErr *clickup.MultipleWorkspacesError
692: 			if errors.As(msg.Err, &mwErr) && len(mwErr.WorkspaceIDs) > 0 {
693: 				m.clickUpPendingQuery = msg.Query
694: 				m.state = stateClickUpWorkspacePicker
695: 				// Build picker labels: "name (id)" when names are available, bare id otherwise.
696: 				items := make([]string, len(mwErr.WorkspaceIDs))
697: 				m.clickUpWorkspaceMap = make(map[string]string, len(mwErr.WorkspaceIDs))
698: 				for i, id := range mwErr.WorkspaceIDs {
699: 					if name, ok := mwErr.WorkspaceNames[id]; ok && name != "" {
700: 						label := name + " (" + id + ")"
701: 						items[i] = label
702: 						m.clickUpWorkspaceMap[label] = id
703: 					} else {
704: 						items[i] = id
705: 						m.clickUpWorkspaceMap[id] = id
706: 					}
707: 				}
708: 				m.overlays.Show(overlay.NewPickerOverlay("select clickup workspace", items))
709: 				return m, nil
710: 			}
711: 			m.toastManager.Error("clickup search failed: " + msg.Err.Error())
712: 			m.state = stateDefault
713: 			return m, m.toastTickCmd()
714: 		}
715: 		if len(msg.Results) == 0 {
716: 			m.toastManager.Info("no clickup tasks found")
717: 			m.state = stateDefault
718: 			return m, m.toastTickCmd()
719: 		}
720: 		m.clickUpResults = msg.Results
721: 		items := make([]string, len(msg.Results))
722: 		for i, r := range msg.Results {
723: 			label := r.ID + " · " + r.Name
724: 			if r.Status != "" {
725: 				label += " (" + r.Status + ")"
726: 			}
727: 			if r.ListName != "" {
728: 				label += " — " + r.ListName
729: 			}
730: 			items[i] = label
731: 		}
732: 		m.state = stateClickUpPicker
733: 		m.overlays.Show(overlay.NewPickerOverlay("select clickup task", items))
734: 		return m, nil
735: 	case tickUpdateMetadataMessage:
736: 		// Snapshot the instance list for the goroutine. The slice header is
737: 		// copied but the pointers are shared — CollectMetadata only reads
738: 		// instance fields that don't change between ticks (started, Status,
739: 		// tmuxSession, gitWorktree, Program).
740: 		instances := m.nav.GetInstances()
741: 		snapshots := make([]*session.Instance, len(instances))
742: 		copy(snapshots, instances)
743: 		taskStateDir := m.taskStateDir // snapshot for goroutine
744: 		signalsDir := m.signalsDir     // snapshot for goroutine
745: 		store := m.taskStore           // snapshot for goroutine
746: 		project := m.taskStoreProject  // snapshot for goroutine
747: 
748: 		return m, func() tea.Msg {
749: 			results := make([]instanceMetadata, 0, len(snapshots))
750: 			for _, inst := range snapshots {
751: 				if !inst.Started() || inst.Paused() {
752: 					continue
753: 				}
754: 				md := inst.CollectMetadata()
755: 				results = append(results, instanceMetadata{
756: 					Title:              inst.Title,
757: 					Content:            md.Content,
758: 					ContentCaptured:    md.ContentCaptured,
759: 					Updated:            md.Updated,
760: 					HasPrompt:          md.HasPrompt,
761: 					DiffStats:          md.DiffStats,
762: 					CPUPercent:         md.CPUPercent,
763: 					MemMB:              md.MemMB,
764: 					ResourceUsageValid: md.ResourceUsageValid,
765: 					TmuxAlive:          md.TmuxAlive,
766: 					PermissionPrompt:   md.PermissionPrompt,
767: 				})
768: 			}
769: 
770: 			// Load plan state — moved here from the synchronous Update handler
771: 			// to avoid blocking the event loop every 500ms.
772: 			// Always reads from the store (embedded or remote) — no JSON fallback.
773: 			var ps *taskstate.TaskState
774: 			if taskStateDir != "" {
775: 				var loaded *taskstate.TaskState
776: 				var err error
777: 				loaded, err = taskstate.Load(store, project, taskStateDir)
778: 				if err != nil {
779: 					log.WarningLog.Printf("could not load plan state: %v", err)
780: 				} else {
781: 					ps = loaded
782: 				}
783: 			}
784: 
785: 			// Scan signals from the project-local signals directory (.kasmos/signals/).
786: 			var signals []taskfsm.Signal
787: 			if signalsDir != "" {
788: 				signals = taskfsm.ScanSignals(signalsDir)
789: 			}
790: 
791: 			// Also scan signals from active worktrees — agents write
792: 			// sentinel files relative to their CWD which is the worktree,
793: 			// not the main repo. Worktrees use .kasmos/signals/ as well.
794: 			seen := make(map[string]bool)
795: 			for _, sig := range signals {
796: 				seen[sig.Key()] = true
797: 			}
798: 			for _, inst := range snapshots {
799: 				wt := inst.GetWorktreePath()
800: 				if wt == "" {
801: 					continue
802: 				}
803: 				wtSignalsDir := filepath.Join(wt, ".kasmos", "signals")
804: 				for _, sig := range taskfsm.ScanSignals(wtSignalsDir) {
805: 					if !seen[sig.Key()] {
806: 						seen[sig.Key()] = true
807: 						signals = append(signals, sig)
808: 					}
809: 				}
810: 			}
811: 
812: 			var waveSignals []taskfsm.WaveSignal
813: 			if signalsDir != "" {
814: 				waveSignals = taskfsm.ScanWaveSignals(signalsDir)
815: 			}
816: 
817: 			tmuxCount := tmux.CountKasSessions(cmd2.MakeExecutor())
818: 			time.Sleep(200 * time.Millisecond)
819: 			return metadataResultMsg{Results: results, PlanState: ps, Signals: signals, WaveSignals: waveSignals, TmuxSessionCount: tmuxCount}
820: 		}
821: 	case metadataResultMsg:
822: 		// Process agent sentinel signals — feed to FSM and consume sentinel files.
823: 		// Done in Update (main goroutine) so FSM writes are never concurrent.
824: 		// Side-effect cmds (reviewer/coder spawns) are collected and batched below.
825: 		var signalCmds []tea.Cmd
826: 		for _, sig := range msg.Signals {
827: 			// Guard: if a wave orchestrator is active for this plan, ignore
828: 			// implement-finished signals. Wave task agents may write this sentinel
829: 			// after completing their individual task, but the wave orchestrator
830: 			// owns the implementing→reviewing transition. Without this guard,
831: 			// the first task to finish prematurely triggers review and pauses
832: 			// sibling tasks, spawning a "applying fixes" coder alongside the
833: 			// reviewer.
834: 			if sig.Event == taskfsm.ImplementFinished {
835: 				if _, hasOrch := m.waveOrchestrators[sig.TaskFile]; hasOrch {
836: 					log.WarningLog.Printf("ignoring implement-finished signal for %q — wave orchestrator active", sig.TaskFile)
837: 					taskfsm.ConsumeSignal(sig)
838: 					continue
839: 				}
840: 			}
841: 
842: 			if err := m.fsm.Transition(sig.TaskFile, sig.Event); err != nil {
843: 				log.WarningLog.Printf("signal %s for %s rejected: %v", sig.Event, sig.TaskFile, err)
844: 				taskfsm.ConsumeSignal(sig)
845: 				continue
846: 			}
847: 			taskfsm.ConsumeSignal(sig)
848: 
849: 			// Side effects: spawn agents in response to successful transitions.
850: 			switch sig.Event {
851: 			case taskfsm.ImplementFinished:
852: 				// Pause the coder that wrote this signal.
853: 				for _, inst := range m.nav.GetInstances() {
854: 					if inst.TaskFile == sig.TaskFile && inst.AgentType == session.AgentTypeCoder {
855: 						inst.ImplementationComplete = true
856: 						_ = inst.Pause()
857: 						break
858: 					}
859: 				}
860: 				// If this coder was spawned to apply reviewer feedback, post fixer_complete.
861: 				// pendingReviewFeedback is set when ReviewChangesRequested fires and
862: 				// cleared here once the fix-coder delivers its implement-finished signal.
863: 				if _, hasFeedback := m.pendingReviewFeedback[sig.TaskFile]; hasFeedback {
864: 					delete(m.pendingReviewFeedback, sig.TaskFile)
865: 					if cmd := m.postClickUpProgress(sig.TaskFile, "fixer_complete", ""); cmd != nil {
866: 						signalCmds = append(signalCmds, cmd)
867: 					}
868: 				}
869: 				if cmd := m.spawnReviewer(sig.TaskFile); cmd != nil {
870: 					signalCmds = append(signalCmds, cmd)
871: 				}
872: 			case taskfsm.ReviewApproved:
873: 				planName := taskstate.DisplayName(sig.TaskFile)
874: 				m.audit(auditlog.EventPlanTransition, "reviewing → done (review approved)",
875: 					auditlog.WithPlan(sig.TaskFile))
876: 				m.toastManager.Success(fmt.Sprintf("review approved: %s", planName))
877: 				// Post progress comment to ClickUp.
878: 				if cmd := m.postClickUpProgress(sig.TaskFile, "review_approved", ""); cmd != nil {
879: 					signalCmds = append(signalCmds, cmd)
880: 				}
881: 				// Kill the reviewer instance — it's done.
882: 				for _, inst := range m.nav.GetInstances() {
883: 					if inst.TaskFile == sig.TaskFile && inst.IsReviewer {
884: 						_ = inst.Kill()
885: 						break
886: 					}
887: 				}
888: 			case taskfsm.ReviewChangesRequested:
889: 				feedback := sig.Body
890: 				m.pendingReviewFeedback[sig.TaskFile] = feedback
891: 				// Post progress comment to ClickUp (truncate feedback to avoid huge comments).
892: 				{
893: 					truncated := feedback
894: 					if len(truncated) > 200 {
895: 						truncated = truncated[:200] + "..."
896: 					}
897: 					if cmd := m.postClickUpProgress(sig.TaskFile, "review_changes_requested", truncated); cmd != nil {
898: 						signalCmds = append(signalCmds, cmd)
899: 					}
900: 				}
901: 				// Pause the reviewer that wrote this signal.
902: 				for _, inst := range m.nav.GetInstances() {
903: 					if inst.TaskFile == sig.TaskFile && inst.IsReviewer {
904: 						_ = inst.Pause()
905: 						break
906: 					}
907: 				}
908: 				// Increment the review cycle counter before spawning the fix coder so
909: 				// that spawnCoderWithFeedback reads the updated (post-increment) value.
910: 				if err := m.taskState.IncrementReviewCycle(sig.TaskFile); err != nil {
911: 					log.WarningLog.Printf("could not increment review cycle for %q: %v", sig.TaskFile, err)
912: 				}
913: 				if cmd := m.spawnCoderWithFeedback(sig.TaskFile, feedback); cmd != nil {
914: 					signalCmds = append(signalCmds, cmd)
915: 				}
916: 			case taskfsm.PlannerFinished:
917: 				capturedPlanFile := sig.TaskFile
918: 				// Ingest the plan content from the agent's worktree into the DB.
919: 				// Planners run on the main branch, so the plan file is in activeRepoPath.
920: 				m.ingestTaskContent(capturedPlanFile, m.activeRepoPath)
921: 				// Post progress comment to ClickUp (fire-and-forget; nil-safe if no task ID).
922: 				{
923: 					summary := ""
924: 					if m.taskStore != nil {
925: 						if content, err := m.taskStore.GetContent(m.taskStoreProject, capturedPlanFile); err == nil {
926: 							if plan, err := taskparser.Parse(content); err == nil {
927: 								totalTasks := 0
928: 								for _, w := range plan.Waves {
929: 									totalTasks += len(w.Tasks)
930: 								}
931: 								summary = fmt.Sprintf("%d tasks, %d waves", totalTasks, len(plan.Waves))
932: 							}
933: 						}
934: 					}
935: 					if cmd := m.postClickUpProgress(capturedPlanFile, "plan_ready", summary); cmd != nil {
936: 						signalCmds = append(signalCmds, cmd)
937: 					}
938: 				}
939: 				if m.plannerPrompted[capturedPlanFile] {
940: 					break
941: 				}
942: 				if m.isUserInOverlay() {
943: 					// Overlay is active — defer the dialog to the next tick
944: 					// instead of silently dropping it. The sentinel has already
945: 					// been consumed and the FSM transitioned; we must not lose
946: 					// the "show dialog" side effect.
947: 					m.deferredPlannerDialogs = append(m.deferredPlannerDialogs, capturedPlanFile)
948: 					break
949: 				}
950: 				// Focus the planner instance so the user sees its output behind the overlay.
951: 				for _, inst := range m.nav.GetInstances() {
952: 					if inst.TaskFile == sig.TaskFile && inst.AgentType == session.AgentTypePlanner {
953: 						if cmd := m.focusInstanceForOverlay(inst); cmd != nil {
954: 							signalCmds = append(signalCmds, cmd)
955: 						}
956: 						m.pendingPlannerInstanceTitle = inst.Title
957: 						break
958: 					}
959: 				}
960: 				m.pendingPlannerTaskFile = capturedPlanFile
961: 				m.confirmAction(
962: 					fmt.Sprintf("task '%s' is ready. start implementation?", taskstate.DisplayName(capturedPlanFile)),
963: 					func() tea.Msg {
964: 						return plannerCompleteMsg{planFile: capturedPlanFile}
965: 					},
966: 				)
967: 			}
968: 		}
969: 		if len(msg.Signals) > 0 {
970: 			m.loadTaskState() // refresh after signal processing
971: 		}
972: 
973: 		// Retry deferred PlannerFinished dialogs — show the first queued plan

1025: 			entry, ok := m.taskState.Entry(ws.TaskFile)

1049: 		// Apply collected metadata to instances — zero I/O, just field writes.

1052: 		for _, inst := range m.nav.GetInstances() {
1053: 			instanceMap[inst.Title] = inst
1054: 		}

1056: 		var asyncCmds []tea.Cmd
1057: 
1058: 		for _, md := range msg.Results {
1059: 			inst, ok := instanceMap[md.Title]

1061: 				continue
1062: 			}
1063: 
1064: 			if md.ContentCaptured {
1065: 				inst.CachedContent = md.Content
1066: 				inst.CachedContentSet = true
1067: 
1068: 				if md.Updated {

1070: 					inst.PromptDetected = false

1072: 					// completion requires this to avoid permission prompts or

1080: 				} else {

1082: 						inst.PromptDetected = true
1083: 						// Defer tmux send-keys to async Cmd (was blocking Update).
1084: 						i := inst
1085: 						asyncCmds = append(asyncCmds, func() tea.Msg {
1086: 							i.TapEnter()

1088: 						})
1089: 					} else {
1090: 						inst.SetStatus(session.Ready)
1091: 					}
1092: 					if inst.Status != session.Running {
1093: 						inst.LastActivity = nil
1094: 					}

1096: 			}
1097: 
1098: 			// Permission prompt detection for opencode.
1099: 			if md.PermissionPrompt != nil && m.state == stateDefault {
1100: 				pp := md.PermissionPrompt
1101: 				cacheKey := config.CacheKey(pp.Pattern, pp.Description)
1102: 				// Guard key: use cache key if available, else sentinel.
1103: 				// Must match what app_input.go sets on confirm.
1104: 				guardKey := cacheKey
1105: 				if guardKey == "" {
1106: 					guardKey = "__handled__"
1107: 				}
1108: 
1109: 				if _, handled := m.permissionHandled[inst]; handled {
1110: 					// Already handled this prompt appearance — skip until cleared.
1111: 				} else if cacheKey != "" && m.permissionStore != nil && m.permissionStore.IsAllowedAlways(m.activeProject(), cacheKey) {

1122: 					}
1123: 					// Show modal (statePermission blocks re-entry on subsequent ticks).

1129: 					m.state = statePermission

1131: 						fmt.Sprintf("permission prompt detected for %s", inst.Title),

1140: 
1141: 			// Deliver queued prompt via async Cmd — SendPrompt contains a 100ms
1142: 			// sleep + two tmux subprocess calls that were blocking the event loop.
1143: 			if inst.QueuedPrompt != "" && (inst.Status == session.Ready || inst.PromptDetected) {

1148: 				asyncCmds = append(asyncCmds, func() tea.Msg {

1156: 			if md.DiffStats != nil {

1165: 		// Clear activity for non-started / paused instances

1172: 		// Apply plan state loaded in the goroutine (replaces synchronous loadTaskState call).

1179: 		// Store the latest tmux session count for the bottom bar.

1183: 		if m.taskState != nil {

1189: 			// Coder-exit → push-prompt: when a coder session's tmux pane has exited

1227: 			// Tmux death detection: mark instances as exited when their tmux

1287: 						}
1288: 						alive, collected := tmuxAliveMap[inst.Title]
1289: 						if !collected {

1291: 						}

1302: 				// All waves complete — pause the last wave's tasks, prompt for review.

1311: 					// Pause all task instances (they're done, free up resources).
1312: 					for _, inst := range m.nav.GetInstances() {

1329: 					if !m.isUserInOverlay() {

146: // showHelpScreen displays the help screen overlay if it hasn't been shown before
147: func (m *home) showHelpScreen(helpType helpText, onDismiss func()) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
148: 	// Get the flag for this help type
149: 	var alwaysShow bool
150: 	switch helpType.(type) {
151: 	case helpTypeGeneral:
152: 		alwaysShow = true
153: 	}
154: 
155: 	flag := helpType.mask()
156: 
157: 	// Check if this help screen has been seen before
158: 	// Only show if we're showing the general help screen or the corresponding flag is not set
159: 	// in the seen bitmask.
160: 	if alwaysShow || (m.appState.GetHelpScreensSeen()&flag) == 0 {
161: 		// Mark this help screen as seen and save state
162: 		if err := m.appState.SetHelpScreensSeen(m.appState.GetHelpScreensSeen() | flag); err != nil {
163: 			log.WarningLog.Printf("Failed to save help screen state: %v", err)
164: 		}
165: 
166: 		content := helpType.toContent()
167: 
168: 		to := overlay.NewTextOverlay(content)
169: 		to.OnDismiss = onDismiss
170: 		m.overlays.Show(to)
171: 		m.state = stateHelp
172: 		return m, nil
173: 	}
174: 
175: 	// Skip displaying the help screen
176: 	if onDismiss != nil {
177: 		onDismiss()
178: 	}
179: 	return m, nil
180: }
181: 
182: // handleHelpState handles key events when in help state
183: func (m *home) handleHelpState(msg tea.KeyPressMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
184: 	// Any key press will close the help overlay
185: 	result := m.overlays.HandleKey(msg)
186: 	if result.Dismissed {
187: 		m.state = stateDefault
188: 		return m, tea.Sequence(
189: 			tea.RequestWindowSize,
190: 			func() tea.Msg {
191: 				m.menu.SetState(ui.StateDefault)
192: 				return nil
193: 			},
194: 		)
195: 	}
196: 
197: 	return m, nil
198: }

279: // TestUpdateInstanceInState_PreservesFields verifies that updating one field of one
280: // instance does not corrupt any fields of the other instances during the JSON
281: // round-trip.  This is the regression test for the data-loss bug in pause/resume.
282: func TestUpdateInstanceInState_PreservesFields(t *testing.T) {
283: 	untouched := fullInstanceRecord("untouched")
284: 	target := fullInstanceRecord("target")
285: 	target.Status = instancePaused // start paused so we can "resume" it
286: 
287: 	state := newTestStateFromRecords(t, []instanceRecord{untouched, target})
288: 
289: 	// Simulate what pause does: sets status to paused and clears the worktree path.
290: 	err := updateInstanceInState(state, "target", func(r *instanceRecord) error {
291: 		r.Status = instancePaused
292: 		r.Worktree.WorktreePath = ""
293: 		return nil
294: 	})
295: 	require.NoError(t, err)
296: 
297: 	records, err := loadInstanceRecords(state)
298: 	require.NoError(t, err)
299: 	require.Len(t, records, 2)
300: 
301: 	// untouched instance must have ALL its fields preserved.
302: 	var gotUntouched, gotTarget instanceRecord
303: 	for _, r := range records {
304: 		switch r.Title {
305: 		case "untouched":
306: 			gotUntouched = r
307: 		case "target":
308: 			gotTarget = r
309: 		}
310: 	}
311: 
312: 	assertRecordFieldsEqual(t, untouched, gotUntouched)
313: 
314: 	// target must have only Status and Worktree.WorktreePath changed.
315: 	assert.Equal(t, instancePaused, gotTarget.Status, "target.Status should be paused")
316: 	assert.Empty(t, gotTarget.Worktree.WorktreePath, "target.Worktree.WorktreePath should be cleared")
317: 	// All other fields of target should be preserved.
318: 	assert.Equal(t, target.Height, gotTarget.Height, "target.Height")
319: 	assert.Equal(t, target.Width, gotTarget.Width, "target.Width")
320: 	assert.Equal(t, target.AutoYes, gotTarget.AutoYes, "target.AutoYes")
321: 	assert.Equal(t, target.SkipPermissions, gotTarget.SkipPermissions, "target.SkipPermissions")
322: 	assert.Equal(t, target.TaskNumber, gotTarget.TaskNumber, "target.TaskNumber")
323: 	assert.Equal(t, target.WaveNumber, gotTarget.WaveNumber, "target.WaveNumber")
324: 	assert.Equal(t, target.PeerCount, gotTarget.PeerCount, "target.PeerCount")
325: 	assert.Equal(t, target.ImplementationComplete, gotTarget.ImplementationComplete, "target.ImplementationComplete")
326: 	assert.Equal(t, target.QueuedPrompt, gotTarget.QueuedPrompt, "target.QueuedPrompt")
327: 	assert.Equal(t, target.ReviewCycle, gotTarget.ReviewCycle, "target.ReviewCycle")
328: 	assert.Equal(t, target.Worktree.RepoPath, gotTarget.Worktree.RepoPath, "target.Worktree.RepoPath")
329: 	assert.Equal(t, target.Worktree.SessionName, gotTarget.Worktree.SessionName, "target.Worktree.SessionName")
330: 	assert.Equal(t, target.Worktree.BranchName, gotTarget.Worktree.BranchName, "target.Worktree.BranchName")
331: 	assert.Equal(t, target.Worktree.BaseCommitSHA, gotTarget.Worktree.BaseCommitSHA, "target.Worktree.BaseCommitSHA")
332: 	assert.Equal(t, target.DiffStats.Added, gotTarget.DiffStats.Added, "target.DiffStats.Added")
333: 	assert.Equal(t, target.DiffStats.Removed, gotTarget.DiffStats.Removed, "target.DiffStats.Removed")
334: 	assert.Equal(t, target.DiffStats.Content, gotTarget.DiffStats.Content, "target.DiffStats.Content")
335: }

1772: 		statusBarView,
1773: 		listAndPreview,
1774: 		m.menu.String(),
1775: 	)
1776: 
1777: 	result := m.overlays.Render(mainView)
1778: 
1779: 	if toastView := m.toastManager.View(); toastView != "" {
1780: 		x, y := m.toastManager.GetPosition()
1781: 		result = overlay.PlaceOverlay(x, y, toastView, result, false, false)
1782: 	}
1783: 
1784: 	// Process bubblezone markers before rendering is complete
1785: 	// (zone markers inflate lipgloss.Width if left in place).
1786: 	result = safeZoneScan(result)
1787: 
1788: 	// Height-fill — ensure enough lines for bubbletea's alt-screen renderer.
1789: 	// OSC 11 handles the actual background color; this just pads vertically.
1790: 	result = ui.FillBackground(result, m.termHeight)
1791: 
1792: 	v := tea.NewView(result)
1793: 	v.AltScreen = true
1794: 	v.MouseMode = tea.MouseModeAllMotion
1795: 	return v
1796: }

1798: func safeZoneScan(s string) (scanned string) {
1799: 	defer func() {
1800: 		if recover() != nil {
1801: 			scanned = s
1802: 		}
1803: 	}()
1804: 
1805: 	return zone.Scan(s)
1806: }
